case_title: DENISE M TRACY VS. CARMENCITA GILES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,564.81 FILED BY TRACY, DENISE M AS TO DEFENDANT GILES, CARMENCITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $80.00) SERVED AUG-30-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GILES, CARMENCITA
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRACY, DENISE M IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GILES, CARMENCITA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
